members.label: table
members.description: small wooden side table beside couch
members.long_form_open_description: Rectangular wooden side/console table in the foreground center-right, dark-stained surface with items on top (lamp, plant, books). Table edge is adjacent to the couch arm.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: between the couch (right) and the stairs/banister (center-left); supports the lamp and potted plant
